page.title: Insight-to-Code Traceability
page.subtitle: Proving explainability and auditability · Modernization Insight → Spec → Code

traces.insight: Settlement calculation contains hardcoded date logic vulnerable to Y2K-style issues
traces.code:
COMPUTE WS-YEAR = FUNCTION INTEGER-OF-DATE(WS-DATE-IN)
  IF WS-YEAR < 50
    MOVE 20 TO WS-CENTURY
  ELSE
    MOVE 19 TO WS-CENTURY
  END-IF

traces.insight: Dynamic SQL in DB2-ACCESS bypasses standard parameter binding — injection risk
traces.code:
STRING 'SELECT * FROM ' WS-TABLE-NAME
  ' WHERE ' WS-COND-FIELD ' = ''' WS-COND-VALUE ''''
  DELIMITED BY SIZE INTO WS-SQL-STMT

traces.insight: Orphan program UTIL-LEGACY contains reusable date utilities referenced nowhere
traces.code:
* UTILITY: DATE CONVERSION ROUTINES
* AUTHOR: J.SMITH 1994
* NOTE: REPLACED BY SETTL-CALC INLINE LOGIC
  PERFORM PARA-CONVERT-JULIAN THRU PARA-CONVERT-EXIT
